allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\(''multer''\); console.log\(''memoryStorage:'', typeof m.memoryStorage\); console.log\(''diskStorage:'', typeof m.diskStorage\); const u = m\({ storage: m.memoryStorage\(\) }\); console.log\(''single:'', typeof u.single\); console.log\(''array:'', typeof u.array\); console.log\(''fields:'', typeof u.fields\); console.log\(''none:'', typeof u.none\); console.log\(''Multer 2.x basic API is compatible''\)")

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; Get-Command mongod -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; \(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\MongoDB' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name; \(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\MongoDB' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name; Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe'; Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe'; Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe'; Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe')

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'; try { $req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\('https://registry.npmjs.org/'\); $req.Timeout = 10000; $callback = { param\($s, $cert, $chain, $err\) Write-Output "===CHAIN==="; foreach \($el in $chain.ChainElements\) { Write-Output \("Subject: " + $el.Certificate.Subject\); Write-Output \("Issuer:  " + $el.Certificate.Issuer\); Write-Output \("Thumb:   " + $el.Certificate.Thumbprint\); Write-Output "" }; return $true }; [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = $callback; $resp = $req.GetResponse\(\); Write-Output "HTTP Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $resp.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERR: " + $_.Exception.Message\) }; [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = $null)

Bash(node -e "const tls=require\('tls'\); const s=tls.connect\({host:'registry.npmjs.org',port:443,servername:'registry.npmjs.org',rejectUnauthorized:false},\(\)=>{let cert=s.getPeerCertificate\(true\); let depth=0; while\(cert && Object.keys\(cert\).length\){console.log\('---depth',depth++,'---'\); console.log\('subject:',cert.subject\); console.log\('issuer: ',cert.issuer\); console.log\('fp:     ',cert.fingerprint256\); if\(cert.issuerCertificate && cert.issuerCertificate!==cert\) cert=cert.issuerCertificate; else break} s.end\(\);}\); s.on\('error',e=>{console.log\('ERR',e.message\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const der=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/zotte/.certs/avg-root.cer'\); const b64=der.toString\('base64'\); const lines=b64.match\(/.{1,64}/g\).join\('\\n'\); const pem='-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\\n'+lines+'\\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----\\n'; fs.writeFileSync\('C:/Users/zotte/.certs/avg-root.pem',pem\); console.log\('PEM written, length',pem.length\);")
